requirement.description: When the driver activates or deactivates the high-beam request, the instrument cluster shall immediately communicate the high-beam request status to the gateway ECU.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify signal is 0 when High-Beam is OFF.
Verify signal is 1 when High-Beam is ON.
Verify immediate transition from OFF to ON.
test_steps: Toggle stalk from OFF to ON
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_ic_hb_003(can_bus):
    states = [decode_hb(can_bus.recv()) for _ in range(20)]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
    assert states.index(1) > states.index(0)

test_cases.test_objective: Verify immediate transition from ON to OFF.
test_steps: Toggle stalk from ON to OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_ic_hb_004(can_bus):
    states = [decode_hb(can_bus.recv()) for _ in range(20)]
    assert 1 in states and 0 in states
    assert states.index(0) > states.index(1)
